heroSkillLinks.name: Snatch
heroSkillLinks.description: Use your hero to kill an enemy and steal mana. The higher the Skill Level is, the more mana stolen.

heroSkillLinks.name: HP Up
heroSkillLinks.description: Increase your hero's Max HP.

heroSkillLinks.name: Shuriken
heroSkillLinks.description: Increase your hero's  Long-ranged Attack Strength, even while defending the tower.

heroSkillLinks.name: Defend Tower
heroSkillLinks.description: Attack with shurikens while in the tower. Increase this skill's Level to increase Attack Speed.

heroSkillLinks.name: Dispatch
heroSkillLinks.description: Reduce your hero's Re-dispatch and Respawn Delays.

heroSkillLinks.name: Dodge
heroSkillLinks.description: Create a chance of evading the enemy's attack.

heroSkillLinks.name: Assassinate
heroSkillLinks.description: Create a chance of finishing an enemy with one hit.

heroSkillLinks.name: Build Tower
heroSkillLinks.description: Increase your tower's Defense.

heroSkillLinks.name: Repair
heroSkillLinks.description: Repair your tower to restore its HP.

heroSkillLinks.name: Shuriken
heroSkillLinks.description: Throw a giant shuriken that pushes an enemy backward with a shock wave.

heroSkillLinks.name: Bomb
heroSkillLinks.description: Throw a bomb that pushes enemies backward with damage.

heroSkillLinks.name: Poison Mist
heroSkillLinks.description: Create a poisonous mist that inflicts damage on all surrounding enemies.

heroSkillLinks.name: Smoke
heroSkillLinks.description: Create smoke in front of your tower to incapacitate the enemy.

heroSkillLinks.name: Defense Stance
heroSkillLinks.description: Command your soldiers to take a defensive stance.

heroSkillLinks.name: Lightning
heroSkillLinks.description: Drop lightning to inflict damage to the entire enemy.

heroSkillLinks.name: Lotus Blizzard
heroSkillLinks.description: Throw a flurry of blades.

heroSkillLinks.name: HP Up
heroSkillLinks.description: Increase your hero's Max HP.

heroSkillLinks.name: Natural Healing
heroSkillLinks.description: Improve your natural healing power to restore HP with time.

heroSkillLinks.name: ATK Up
heroSkillLinks.description: Increase your hero's basic Attack Strength.

heroSkillLinks.name: DEF Up
heroSkillLinks.description: Increase your hero's Defense.

heroSkillLinks.name: Mane Spikes
heroSkillLinks.description: Spike your hero's mane to counter his attacker.

heroSkillLinks.name: Deflect
heroSkillLinks.description: Build muscle to deflect attackers.

heroSkillLinks.name: Defend Tower
heroSkillLinks.description: Attack the enemy while in your tower. Increase this skill's Level for improved damage.

heroSkillLinks.name: Dispatch
heroSkillLinks.description: Reduce your hero's Re-dispatch and Respawn Delays.

heroSkillLinks.name: Charge
heroSkillLinks.description: Increase the Movement Speed of surrounding units.

heroSkillLinks.name: Feast
heroSkillLinks.description: Eat meat to restore HP.

heroSkillLinks.name: Berserk
heroSkillLinks.description: Increase the Attack Speed of surrounding units.

heroSkillLinks.name: Parry
heroSkillLinks.description: Return damage to attackers with no damage on your end.

heroSkillLinks.name: Draft
heroSkillLinks.description: Draft soldiers to reduce Respawn Delay.

heroSkillLinks.name: Lion Roar
heroSkillLinks.description: Shout out loud to Stun enemies and push them backward.

heroSkillLinks.name: Wave
heroSkillLinks.description: Muster energy to attack. Increase Movement and Attack Strengths at the cost of your entire Defense.

heroSkillLinks.name: Rally
heroSkillLinks.description: Summon units to your hero's side.

heroSkillLinks.name: HP Up
heroSkillLinks.description: Increase your hero's Max HP.

heroSkillLinks.name: Defend Tower
heroSkillLinks.description: Enable to shoot Magic Spheres while in your tower. Increase this skill's Level for a broader Attack Range.

heroSkillLinks.name: Multi Shot
heroSkillLinks.description: Increase your number of Magic Spheres.

heroSkillLinks.name: Mana Wall
heroSkillLinks.description: Create a shield that neutralizes Long-ranged attacks while protecting nearby units.

heroSkillLinks.name: Vampire
heroSkillLinks.description: Restore HP while attacking.

heroSkillLinks.name: Temptation
heroSkillLinks.description: Create a chance of convering enemy units to your side.

heroSkillLinks.name: Dispatch
heroSkillLinks.description: Reduce your hero's Re-dispatch and Respawn Delays.

heroSkillLinks.name: Mana Gain
heroSkillLinks.description: Create a chance of regaining mana when attacked.

heroSkillLinks.name: Encourage
heroSkillLinks.description: Increase the damage and range of Long-ranged units.

heroSkillLinks.name: Align
heroSkillLinks.description: Send Melee units to the front and the Long-ranged to the back.

heroSkillLinks.name: Balance
heroSkillLinks.description: Equalize the HP of surrounding units.

heroSkillLinks.name: Recharge
heroSkillLinks.description: Increase Mana Regeneration Speed at the cost of your unit production for the skill's duration.

heroSkillLinks.name: Recall
heroSkillLinks.description: Recall your hero along with surrounding units to the front of your tower.

heroSkillLinks.name: Convert Spirit
heroSkillLinks.description: Convert your hero's HP to MP.

heroSkillLinks.name: Return to Nature
heroSkillLinks.description: Convert low-HP units into mana. Increase this skill's Level for a higher conversion rate.

heroSkillLinks.name: Armageddon
heroSkillLinks.description: Deliver a meteor attack, and then increase your tower's Mana Regeneration.

findings: 24/24 passive rows are reachable directly by hero-skill slotOrPowerCandidate indices.
21 hero-skill rows match passive rows by exact normalized name, and 3 more match as Defend Tower -> * Tower Defense aliases.
Slots 6, 13, and 23 are the clearest alias cases: three Defend Tower master rows line up with Thief/Helba/Juno Tower Defense passive rows.
Slots 29, 30, and 31 remain outside the passive-row range and currently host special mode-0:2 rows such as Stun, Smoke, and Armageddon Buff.
